---
title: "06_dydid"
author: Tyler L. McIntosh
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    html-math-method: katex
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    toc-title: Contents
    toc-location: right
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
---


# Setup for analysis

``` {r setupchunk}
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: 'hide'

rm(list = ls())

if(!requireNamespace("here", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("here")
}
library(here)

source(here::here("utils", "functions.R"))

# install_load_packages(c(
#   "tidyverse",
#   "tictoc",
#   "hstats",
#   "glue",
#   "shapviz",
#   #"patchwork",
#   #"cobalt",
#   #"corrplot",
#   #"gridExtra",
#   "fect",
#   "fixest",
#   "did",
#   "arrow",
#   "panelView",
#   "PanelMatch",
#   "didimputation",
#   "doParallel",
#   "HonestDid",
#   "HonestDidFEct",
#   "DIDmultiplegtDYN",
#   "sf",
#   "spdep",
#   "gstat",
#   "scales",
#   "broom",
#   "ggfixest"))

install_load_packages(c(
  "tidyverse",
  "tictoc",
  "glue",
  "fixest",
  "arrow"
))

dir_figs <- here::here('figs', "GEE_resilience_v6_operational_ss500_ts50000")
dir_derived <- here::here('data', 'derived', 'GEE_resilience_v6_operational_ss500_ts50000')
#dir_derived <- here::here('data', 'derived', 'idb_500_20251130')
dir_raw <- here::here('data', 'raw')
dir_manual <- here::here('data', 'manual')
dir_ensure(c(dir_figs,
             dir_derived,
             dir_manual,
             dir_raw))

seed = 1234
set.seed(seed)


```

#

```{r}



forested_ecoregions <- tibble(
  na_l3name = c(
    "Blue Mountains",
    "Cascades",
    "Coast Range",
    "Eastern Cascades Slopes and Foothills",
    "Klamath Mountains",
    "North Cascades",
    "Straight of Georgia/Puget Lowland",
    "Willamette Valley",
    "California Coastal Sage, Chaparral, and Oak Woodlands",
    "Sierra Nevada",
    "Southern and Baja California Pine-Oak Mountains",
    "Canadian Rockies",
    "Idaho Batholith",
    "Middle Rockies",
    "Columbia Mountains/Northern Rockies",
    "Southern Rockies",
    "Wasatch and Uinta Mountains",
    "Arizona/New Mexico Mountains",
    "Colorado Plateaus"
  ),
  na_l3code = c(
    "6.2.9", "6.2.7", "7.1.8", "6.2.8", "6.2.11", "6.2.5", "7.1.7",
    "7.1.9", "11.1.1", "6.2.12", "11.1.3", "6.2.4", "6.2.15",
    "6.2.10", "6.2.3", "6.2.14", "6.2.13", "13.1.1", "10.1.6"
  ),
  short_name = c(
    "Blue Mtns", "Cascades", "Coast Range", "Eastern Cascades",
    "Klamath Mtns", "North Cascades", "Puget Lowland",
    "Willamette Valley", "Central California Mtns", "Sierra Nevada",
    "Southern California Mtns", "Canadian Rockies", "Idaho Batholith",
    "Middle Rockies", "Northern Rockies", "Southern Rockies",
    "Wasatch Uinta Mtns", "AZ/NM Mtns", "Colorado Plateaus"
  ),
  region = c(
    "Pacific Northwest", "Pacific Northwest", "Pacific Northwest",
    "Pacific Northwest", "Pacific Northwest", "Pacific Northwest",
    "Pacific Northwest", "Pacific Northwest",
    "California", "California", "California",
    "Upper Rockies", "Upper Rockies", "Upper Rockies", "Upper Rockies",
    "Lower Rockies", "Lower Rockies",
    "Southwest", "Southwest"
  ),
  code_name = c(
    "bluemtns", "cascades", "coastrange", "eastcascades",
    "klamathmtns", "northcascades", "pugetlowland",
    "willamettevalley", "centralcaliforniamtns", "sierranevada",
    "southerncaliforniamtns", "canadianrockies", "idahobatholith",
    "middlerockies", "northernrockies", "southernrockies",
    "wasatchuintamtns", "aznmmtns", "coloradoplateaus"
  ),
  us_l3code = c(
    "11", "4", "1", "9", "78", "77", "2", "3", "6", "5", "8",
    "41", "16", "17", "15", "21", "19", "23", "20"
  )
)

# Remove ecoregions with <30% USFS forested land coverage
forested_ecoregions <- forested_ecoregions |> filter(code_name != "coastrange" &
                                code_name != "pugetlowland" & 
                                code_name != "willamettevalley" &
                                code_name != "coloradoplateaus" &
                                code_name != "centralcaliforniamtns")


```




# code for setting groups

```{r}

set_cd_groups <- function(df,
                          b_nm,
                          d_nm,
                          cd_nm,
                          b_threshold,
                          d_threshold) {
  
  if(d_threshold < 0) {
    df_new <- df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      "{cd_nm}" := dplyr::case_when(
        .data[[b_nm]] <  b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] >  d_threshold ~ "f",
        .data[[b_nm]] >= b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] >  d_threshold ~ "bf",
        .data[[b_nm]] <  b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] <= d_threshold ~ "df",
        .data[[b_nm]] >= b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] <= d_threshold ~ "bdf",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    )
  } else {
    df_new <- df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      "{cd_nm}" := dplyr::case_when(
        .data[[b_nm]] <  b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] <  d_threshold ~ "f",
        .data[[b_nm]] >= b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] <  d_threshold ~ "bf",
        .data[[b_nm]] <  b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] >= d_threshold ~ "df",
        .data[[b_nm]] >= b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] >= d_threshold ~ "bdf",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    )
    
  }

  
  return(df_new)
}


```




# Test spatial cutoffs - LATER

```{}


```


# Wrapper functions
```{r}

# This function runs a feols analysis on dataframe df using ref_period.
# It will compute the model using all 0 values in trt_col (treatment column) as the control and all 1 values in trt_col with grp in subgrp_col as the estimating group 
feols_trt_subg <- function(subgrp_col,
                              grp,
                              trt_col = "fire",
                              df,
                              ...) {
  # Convert string to symbol
  col_sym <- sym(subgrp_col)
  trt_col_sym <- sym(trt_col)
  
  df_never_trt <- df |>
    filter(!!trt_col_sym == 0)
  
  df_subset <- df |>
    filter(!!trt_col_sym == 1 & !!col_sym == grp)
  
  df_use <- bind_rows(df_never_trt, df_subset)

  model <- feols(
    data = df_use,
    ...
  )
  
  n_treated_subgroup_units <- length(unique(df_subset$pt_id))
  n_never_treated_units <- length(unique(df_never_trt$pt_id))
  attr(model, "n_treated_subgroup_units") <- n_treated_subgroup_units
  attr(model, "n_never_treated_units") <- n_never_treated_units
  
  return(model)
}


feols_multi_trt <- function(subgrp_col,
                            df,
                            groups = NULL,
                            trt_col,
                            ...) {

  if (is.null(groups)) {
    groups <- sort(unique(df[[subgrp_col]]))
    groups <- groups[!is.na(groups)]
  }

  models <- purrr::map(groups, \(g) {
    feols_trt_subg(subgrp_col = subgrp_col, grp = g, df = df, trt_col = trt_col, ...)
  })

  names(models) <- groups

  models
}


# Model list and model_labels should be the same length!
# If item in model_list contains attribute "n_treated_subgroup_units", the attribute will be appended to the model name in the legend

plot_sunab_models <- function(model_list,
                              model_labels = NULL,
                              title = "Dynamic-DiD Event-Study Estimates from Multiple Models",
                              ribbon_type = "ribbon", #either "ribbon" or "dashed",
                              caption = "95% confidence intervals shown;\nInteraction-weighted (Sun-Abraham) estimates used;\nConley standard errors with 125km cutoff, 20km pixel",
                              baseline = -1,
                              xlim = c(-10, 20),
                              ylim = c(-50, 50)
                              ) {
  
  # If no labels provided, auto-label as Model 1, Model 2, etc.
  if (is.null(model_labels)) {
    model_labels <- paste0("Model ", seq_along(model_list))
  }
  
  # Extract coefficients for each model and attach model label
  plot_data <- map2_dfr(model_list, model_labels, function(model, label) {
    df <- as.data.frame(as.matrix(model$coeftable))
    df$term <- rownames(model$coeftable)
    
    has_attr <- function(x, attr_name) {
      !is.null(attr(x, attr_name))
    }
    
    if (has_attr(model, "n_treated_subgroup_units")) {
      label <- glue("{label} (N = {attr(model, 'n_treated_subgroup_units')})")
    }
    
    df %>%
      filter(str_detect(term, "^year::")) %>%
      mutate(
        Time = as.numeric(str_extract(term, "-?\\d+")),
        CI_upper = Estimate + 1.96 * `Std. Error`,
        CI_lower = Estimate - 1.96 * `Std. Error`,
        Model = label
      )
  })

  # Plot
  if(ribbon_type == "ribbon") {
    ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Time, y = Estimate, color = Model, fill = Model)) +
      geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
      geom_point(size = 2) +
      geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = CI_lower, ymax = CI_upper), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = baseline, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black") +
      labs(
        x = "Event Time",
        y = "Treatment Effect",
        title = title,
        caption = caption
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom")  +
      xlim(xlim)+
      ylim(ylim)
  } else {
    ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Time, y = Estimate, color = Model)) +
      geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
      geom_point(size = 2) +
      
      # CI as dotted lines instead of ribbon
      geom_line(aes(y = CI_upper), linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 0.8) +
      geom_line(aes(y = CI_lower), linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 0.8) +
      
      geom_vline(xintercept = baseline, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black") +
      labs(
        x = "Event Time",
        y = "Treatment Effect",
        title = title,
        caption = caption
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
      xlim(xlim) +
      ylim(ylim)
  }

}



run_dydid_model <- function(l3) {
  
  print(l3)
  
  d_l_f <- list.files(
    here::here(dir_derived, "parquet"),
    pattern = glue("dats_long_{l3}.parquet$"),
    full.names = TRUE
  )
  
  d_l <- open_dataset(d_l_f, format = "parquet") |>
    collect()
  # 
  # d_l <- d_l |> filter(year >= 2000)
  #   
  d_l <- set_cd_groups(df = d_l,
                     b_nm = "biotic_relaxedforestnorm_5_yrs_prior_sum_yot",
                     d_nm = "pdsi_annual_5_yrs_prior_threshold_n4_yot",
                     cd_nm = "cd_group_b10_pdsin4t1",
                     b_threshold = 10,
                     d_threshold = 1)
  
  d_l <- set_cd_groups(df = d_l,
                     b_nm = "biotic_relaxedforestnorm_5_yrs_prior_sum_yot",
                     d_nm = "pdsi_annual_5_yrs_prior_threshold_n3_yot",
                     cd_nm = "cd_group_b10_pdsin3t1",
                     b_threshold = 10,
                     d_threshold = 1)
  

  
  d_l <- set_cd_groups(df = d_l,
                     b_nm = "biotic_relaxedforestnorm_5_yrs_prior_sum_yot",
                     d_nm = "pdsi_annual_5_yrs_prior_sum_yot",
                     cd_nm = "cd_group_b10_pdsisumn10",
                     b_threshold = 10,
                     d_threshold = -10)

  # 
  # tic("models1")
  # models1 <- feols_multi_trt(subgrp_col = "cd_group_b10_pdsin4t1",
  #                               df = d_l,
  #                               groups = NULL,
  #                               trt_col = "fire",
  #                               fml = rap_tree ~ biotic_relaxedforestnorm + pdsi_annual + sunab(FirstTreat, year, ref.p = -6) | pt_id + year,
  #                               #fml = rap_tree ~ pdsi_annual + sunab(FirstTreat, year, ref.p = -6) | uniqueID + year,
  #                               mem.clean = TRUE,
  #                               lean = FALSE,
  #                               vcov = fixest::vcov_conley(lat = "lat",
  #                                                          lon = "long",
  #                                                          cutoff = 125,
  #                                                          pixel = 20,
  #                                                          distance = "triangular"
  #                                                          )
  #                               )
  # toc()
  # tic("plot1")
  # 
  # plot_sunab_models(models1,
  #                   names(models1),
  #                   title = glue("DyDID analysis for {l3}, cd_group_b10_pdsin4t1"),
  #                   baseline = -6,
  #                   xlim = c(-10, 20),
  #                   ylim = c(-50, 10))
  # ggsave(here(dir_figs, glue("dydid_cd_group_b10_pdsin4t1_{l3}.png")))
  # toc()
  # 
  # tic("model2")
  # models2 <- feols_multi_trt(subgrp_col = "cd_group_b10_pdsisumn10",
  #                               df = d_l,
  #                               groups = NULL,
  #                               trt_col = "fire",
  #                               fml = rap_tree ~ biotic_relaxedforestnorm + pdsi_annual + sunab(FirstTreat, year, ref.p = -6) | pt_id + year,
  #                               #fml = rap_tree ~ pdsi_annual + sunab(FirstTreat, year, ref.p = -6) | uniqueID + year,
  #                               mem.clean = TRUE,
  #                               lean = FALSE,
  #                               vcov = fixest::vcov_conley(lat = "lat",
  #                                                          lon = "long",
  #                                                          cutoff = 125,
  #                                                          pixel = 20,
  #                                                          distance = "triangular"
  #                                                          )
  #                               )
  # toc()
  # 
  # tic("plot2")
  # 
  # plot_sunab_models(models2,
  #                   names(models2),
  #                   title = glue("DyDID analysis for {l3}, cd_group_b10_pdsisumn10"),
  #                   baseline = -6,
  #                   xlim = c(-10, 20),
  #                   ylim = c(-50, 10))
  # 
  # ggsave(here(dir_figs, glue("dydid_cd_group_b10_pdsisumn10_{l3}.png")))
  # toc()
  # 
  
  tic("model3")
  models2 <- feols_multi_trt(subgrp_col = "cd_group_b10_pdsin3t1",
                                df = d_l,
                                groups = NULL,
                                trt_col = "fire",
                                fml = rap_tree ~ biotic_relaxedforestnorm + pdsi_annual + sunab(FirstTreat, year, ref.p = -6) | pt_id + year,
                                #fml = rap_tree ~ pdsi_annual + sunab(FirstTreat, year, ref.p = -6) | uniqueID + year,
                                mem.clean = TRUE,
                                lean = FALSE,
                                vcov = fixest::vcov_conley(lat = "lat",
                                                           lon = "long",
                                                           cutoff = 125,
                                                           pixel = 20,
                                                           distance = "triangular"
                                                           )
                                )
  toc()
  
  tic("plot3")
  
  plot_sunab_models(models2,
                    names(models2),
                    title = glue("DyDID analysis for {l3}, cd_group_b10_pdsin3t1"),
                    baseline = -6,
                    xlim = c(-10, 20),
                    ylim = c(-50, 10))
  
  ggsave(here(dir_figs, glue("dydid_cd_group_b10_pdsin3t1_{l3}.png")))
  toc()
  
}





  

```



# Run models
```{r}

# FOR EACH ECOREGION

tic()
dats_by_l3 <- purrr::map(
  forested_ecoregions$code_name,
  run_dydid_model
)
toc()








d_l_f <- list.files(
  here::here(dir_derived, "parquet"),
  pattern = "dats_long_",
  full.names = TRUE
)

d_l <- open_dataset(d_l_f, format = "parquet") |>
  collect()

# 
# d_l <- d_l |> filter(year >= 2000)
#   
d_l <- set_cd_groups(df = d_l,
                   b_nm = "biotic_relaxedforestnorm_5_yrs_prior_sum_yot",
                   d_nm = "pdsi_annual_5_yrs_prior_threshold_n4_yot",
                   cd_nm = "cd_group_b10_pdsin4t1",
                   b_threshold = 10,
                   d_threshold = 1)

d_l <- set_cd_groups(df = d_l,
                   b_nm = "biotic_relaxedforestnorm_5_yrs_prior_sum_yot",
                   d_nm = "pdsi_annual_5_yrs_prior_threshold_n3_yot",
                   cd_nm = "cd_group_b10_pdsin3t1",
                   b_threshold = 10,
                   d_threshold = 1)



d_l <- set_cd_groups(df = d_l,
                   b_nm = "biotic_relaxedforestnorm_5_yrs_prior_sum_yot",
                   d_nm = "pdsi_annual_5_yrs_prior_sum_yot",
                   cd_nm = "cd_group_b10_pdsisumn10",
                   b_threshold = 10,
                   d_threshold = -10)


d_l <- d_l |>
  select(pt_id, year, fire, lat, long, FirstTreat, rap_tree, biotic_relaxedforestnorm, pdsi_annual, cd_group_b10_pdsisumn10, cd_group_b10_pdsin4t1) |>
  filter(year >= 1995)

gc()

tic("models1")
models1 <- feols_multi_trt(subgrp_col = "cd_group_b10_pdsin4t1",
                              df = d_l,
                              groups = NULL,
                              trt_col = "fire",
                              fml = rap_tree ~ biotic_relaxedforestnorm + pdsi_annual + sunab(FirstTreat, year, ref.p = -6) | pt_id + year,
                              #fml = rap_tree ~ pdsi_annual + sunab(FirstTreat, year, ref.p = -6) | uniqueID + year,
                              mem.clean = TRUE,
                              lean = FALSE,
                              vcov = fixest::vcov_conley(lat = "lat",
                                                         lon = "long",
                                                         cutoff = 125,
                                                         pixel = 20,
                                                         distance = "triangular"
                                                         )
                              )
toc()
tic("plot1")

plot_sunab_models(models1,
                  names(models1),
                  title = glue("DyDID analysis for ALL, cd_group_b10_pdsin4t1"),
                  baseline = -6,
                  xlim = c(-10, 20),
                  ylim = c(-50, 10))
ggsave(here(dir_figs, glue("dydid_cd_group_b10_pdsin4t1_ALL.png")))
toc()



tic("models2")
models2 <- feols_multi_trt(subgrp_col = "cd_group_b10_pdsisumn10",
                              df = d_l,
                              groups = NULL,
                              trt_col = "fire",
                              fml = rap_tree ~ biotic_relaxedforestnorm + pdsi_annual + sunab(FirstTreat, year, ref.p = -6) | pt_id + year,
                              #fml = rap_tree ~ pdsi_annual + sunab(FirstTreat, year, ref.p = -6) | uniqueID + year,
                              mem.clean = TRUE,
                              lean = FALSE,
                              vcov = fixest::vcov_conley(lat = "lat",
                                                         lon = "long",
                                                         cutoff = 125,
                                                         pixel = 20,
                                                         distance = "triangular"
                                                         )
                              )
toc()

tic("plot2")

plot_sunab_models(models2,
                  names(models2),
                  title = glue("DyDID analysis for ALL, cd_group_b10_pdsisumn10"),
                  baseline = -6,
                  xlim = c(-10, 20),
                  ylim = c(-50, 10))

ggsave(here(dir_figs, glue("dydid_cd_group_b10_pdsisumn10_ALL.png")))
toc()


























# 
# ids_f <- unique(d_l |> filter(fire == 1) |> pull(pt_id)) |> sample(10000)
# ids_nf <- unique(d_l |> filter(fire == 1) |> pull(pt_id)) |> sample(10000)
# 
# dt <- d_l |> filter(pt_id %in% c(ids_f, ids_nf))
# 
# models1 <- feols_multi_trt(subgrp_col = "cd_group_b10_pdsisumn10",
#                               df = dt,
#                               groups = NULL,
#                               trt_col = "fire",
#                               fml = rap_tree ~ biotic_relaxedforestnorm + pdsi_annual + sunab(FirstTreat, year, ref.p = -6) | pt_id + year,
#                               #fml = rap_tree ~ pdsi_annual + sunab(FirstTreat, year, ref.p = -6) | uniqueID + year,
#                               mem.clean = TRUE,
#                               lean = FALSE,
#                               vcov = fixest::vcov_conley(lat = "lat",
#                                                          lon = "long",
#                                                          cutoff = 125,
#                                                          pixel = 20,
#                                                          distance = "triangular"
#                                                          )
#                               )
# 
# 
# 
# plot_sunab_models(models1,
#                   names(models1),
#                   baseline = -6,
#                   xlim = c(-10, 20),
#                   ylim = c(-50, 10))
# 
# # 
# # ggplot(dats_use |> filter(cd_group == "bf" | cd_group == "bdf"), aes(biotic_5_yrs_prior_sum)) +
# #   geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
# #   facet_wrap(~ cd_group)


```


# FUNCTIONS VERSION 2

```{r}

feols_trt_subg <- function(subgrp_col,
                           grp,
                           trt_col = "fire",
                           df,
                           ...) {
  
  col_sym <- rlang::sym(subgrp_col)
  trt_col_sym <- rlang::sym(trt_col)
  
  df_never_trt <- df |>
    dplyr::filter(!!trt_col_sym == 0)
  
  df_subset <- df |>
    dplyr::filter(!!trt_col_sym == 1 & !!col_sym == grp)
  
  df_use <- dplyr::bind_rows(df_never_trt, df_subset)
  
  model <- fixest::feols(
    data = df_use,
    ...
  )
  
  attr(model, "n_treated_subgroup_units") <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_subset$pt_id)
  attr(model, "n_never_treated_units") <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_never_trt$pt_id)
  
  model
}


feols_multi_trt <- function(subgrp_col,
                            df,
                            groups = NULL,
                            trt_col,
                            ...) {
  
  if (is.null(groups)) {
    groups <- sort(unique(df[[subgrp_col]]))
    groups <- groups[!is.na(groups)]
  }
  
  models <- purrr::map(
    groups,
    \(g) {
      feols_trt_subg(
        subgrp_col = subgrp_col,
        grp = g,
        df = df,
        trt_col = trt_col,
        ...
      )
    }
  )
  
  names(models) <- groups
  
  models
}


set_cd_groups <- function(df,
                          b_nm,
                          d_nm,
                          cd_nm,
                          b_threshold,
                          d_threshold) {
  
  if (d_threshold < 0) {
    df_new <- df |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        "{cd_nm}" := dplyr::case_when(
          .data[[b_nm]] <  b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] >  d_threshold ~ "f",
          .data[[b_nm]] >= b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] >  d_threshold ~ "bf",
          .data[[b_nm]] <  b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] <= d_threshold ~ "df",
          .data[[b_nm]] >= b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] <= d_threshold ~ "bdf",
          TRUE ~ NA_character_
        )
      )
  } else {
    df_new <- df |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        "{cd_nm}" := dplyr::case_when(
          .data[[b_nm]] <  b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] <  d_threshold ~ "f",
          .data[[b_nm]] >= b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] <  d_threshold ~ "bf",
          .data[[b_nm]] <  b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] >= d_threshold ~ "df",
          .data[[b_nm]] >= b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] >= d_threshold ~ "bdf",
          TRUE ~ NA_character_
        )
      )
  }
  
  df_new
}


extract_sunab_plot_data <- function(model_list, model_labels = NULL) {
  
  if (is.null(model_labels)) {
    model_labels <- names(model_list)
  }
  
  if (is.null(model_labels)) {
    model_labels <- paste0("Model ", seq_along(model_list))
  }
  
  if (length(model_list) != length(model_labels)) {
    stop("model_list and model_labels must be the same length.")
  }
  
  plot_data <- purrr::map2_dfr(
    model_list,
    model_labels,
    \(model, label) {
      df <- as.data.frame(as.matrix(model$coeftable))
      df$term <- rownames(model$coeftable)
      
      display_label <- label
      
      if (!is.null(attr(model, "n_treated_subgroup_units"))) {
        display_label <- glue::glue(
          "{label} (N = {attr(model, 'n_treated_subgroup_units')})"
        )
      }
      
      df |>
        dplyr::filter(stringr::str_detect(term, "^year::")) |>
        dplyr::mutate(
          Time = as.numeric(stringr::str_extract(term, "-?\\d+")),
          CI_upper = Estimate + 1.96 * `Std. Error`,
          CI_lower = Estimate - 1.96 * `Std. Error`,
          Group = label,
          Model = display_label
        )
    }
  )
  
  if (nrow(plot_data) == 0) {
    stop("No event-study coefficients found matching '^year::'.")
  }
  
  plot_data |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      Group = factor(Group, levels = model_labels),
      Model = factor(Model, levels = unique(Model))
    )
}


plot_sunab_models <- function(model_list,
                              model_labels = NULL,
                              title = "Dynamic-DiD Event-Study Estimates from Multiple Models",
                              ribbon_type = "ribbon",
                              caption = "95% confidence intervals shown",
                              baseline = -1,
                              xlim = c(-10, 20),
                              ylim = c(-50, 50),
                              palette = NULL,
                              return_data = FALSE) {
  
  plot_data <- extract_sunab_plot_data(
    model_list = model_list,
    model_labels = model_labels
  )
  
  breaks_use <- plot_data |>
    dplyr::distinct(Group, Model) |>
    dplyr::pull(Group) |>
    as.character()
  
  labels_use <- plot_data |>
    dplyr::distinct(Group, Model) |>
    dplyr::pull(Model) |>
    as.character()
  
  if (ribbon_type == "ribbon") {
    p <- ggplot2::ggplot(
      plot_data,
      ggplot2::aes(x = Time, y = Estimate, color = Group, fill = Group)
    ) +
      ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
      ggplot2::geom_point(size = 2) +
      ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
        ggplot2::aes(ymin = CI_lower, ymax = CI_upper),
        alpha = 0.2,
        color = NA
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_vline(
        xintercept = baseline,
        linetype = "dashed",
        color = "gray40"
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_vline(
        xintercept = 0,
        linetype = "dashed",
        color = "red"
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black") +
      ggplot2::labs(
        x = "Event Time",
        y = "Treatment Effect",
        title = title,
        caption = caption,
        color = NULL,
        fill = NULL
      ) +
      ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
      ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
      ggplot2::coord_cartesian(xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim)
  } else {
    p <- ggplot2::ggplot(
      plot_data,
      ggplot2::aes(x = Time, y = Estimate, color = Group)
    ) +
      ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
      ggplot2::geom_point(size = 2) +
      ggplot2::geom_line(
        ggplot2::aes(y = CI_upper),
        linetype = "dotted",
        linewidth = 0.8
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_line(
        ggplot2::aes(y = CI_lower),
        linetype = "dotted",
        linewidth = 0.8
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_vline(
        xintercept = baseline,
        linetype = "dashed",
        color = "gray40"
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_vline(
        xintercept = 0,
        linetype = "dashed",
        color = "red"
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black") +
      ggplot2::labs(
        x = "Event Time",
        y = "Treatment Effect",
        title = title,
        caption = caption,
        color = NULL
      ) +
      ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
      ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
      ggplot2::coord_cartesian(xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim)
  }
  
  if (!is.null(palette)) {
    if (is.null(names(palette))) {
      stop("palette must be a named character vector.")
    }
    
    palette_use <- palette[intersect(names(palette), breaks_use)]
    
    if (length(palette_use) > 0) {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
          values = palette_use,
          breaks = names(palette_use),
          labels = labels_use[match(names(palette_use), breaks_use)],
          drop = TRUE
        )
      
      if (ribbon_type == "ribbon") {
        p <- p +
          ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
            values = palette_use,
            breaks = names(palette_use),
            labels = labels_use[match(names(palette_use), breaks_use)],
            drop = TRUE
          )
      }
    }
  } else {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::scale_color_discrete(
        breaks = breaks_use,
        labels = labels_use
      )
    
    if (ribbon_type == "ribbon") {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::scale_fill_discrete(
          breaks = breaks_use,
          labels = labels_use
        )
    }
  }
  
  if (return_data) {
    return(list(plot = p, plot_data = plot_data))
  }
  
  p
}


make_analysis_specs_ecoregions <- function(forested_ecoregions,
                                           dir_data,
                                           parquet_pattern_prefix = "dats_long_") {
  
  if (!"code_name" %in% names(forested_ecoregions)) {
    stop("forested_ecoregions must contain a 'code_name' column.")
  }
  
  parquet_dir <- file.path(dir_data, "parquet")
  
  analysis_specs <- forested_ecoregions |>
    dplyr::distinct(code_name) |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      analysis_id = code_name,
      parquet_files = purrr::map(
        code_name,
        \(x) file.path(parquet_dir, glue::glue("{parquet_pattern_prefix}{x}.parquet"))
      )
    )
  
  missing_any <- analysis_specs |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      missing = purrr::map_lgl(parquet_files, \(x) !all(file.exists(x)))
    ) |>
    dplyr::filter(missing)
  
  if (nrow(missing_any) > 0) {
    warning(
      "Some parquet files listed in analysis_specs do not exist yet: ",
      paste(missing_any$analysis_id, collapse = ", ")
    )
  }
  
  analysis_specs
}


run_dydid_model_on_df <- function(df,
                                  analysis_id,
                                  outcome,
                                  vcov,
                                  vcov_id,
                                  vcov_label = vcov_id,
                                  dir_out,
                                  group_fun = set_cd_groups,
                                  group_args,
                                  palette = NULL,
                                  baseline = -6,
                                  xlim = c(-10, 20),
                                  ylim = c(-50, 10),
                                  ribbon_type = "ribbon",
                                  width = 10,
                                  height = 7,
                                  dpi = 300,
                                  trt_col = "fire") {
  
  strip_fixest_model <- function(model) {
    out <- list(
      coeftable = model$coeftable
    )
    
    attr(out, "n_treated_subgroup_units") <- attr(model, "n_treated_subgroup_units")
    attr(out, "n_never_treated_units") <- attr(model, "n_never_treated_units")
    
    out
  }
  
  if (!is.data.frame(df)) {
    stop("df must be a data frame or tibble.")
  }
  
  if (missing(group_args) || !is.list(group_args)) {
    stop("group_args must be supplied as a named list.")
  }
  
  if (is.null(group_args$cd_nm)) {
    stop("group_args must include cd_nm.")
  }
  
  if (!outcome %in% names(df)) {
    stop(glue::glue("Outcome column '{outcome}' not found in df."))
  }
  
  cd_nm <- group_args$cd_nm
  
  safe_analysis_id <- gsub("[^[:alnum:]_\\-]+", "_", analysis_id)
  safe_vcov_id <- gsub("[^[:alnum:]_\\-]+", "_", vcov_id)
  
  out_dir_model <- file.path(
    dir_out,
    paste0(outcome, "_", cd_nm, "_", safe_vcov_id)
  )
  dir.create(out_dir_model, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  df_grouped <- do.call(
    group_fun,
    c(list(df = df), group_args)
  )
  
  if (!cd_nm %in% names(df_grouped)) {
    stop(glue::glue("Grouping function did not create column '{cd_nm}'."))
  }
  
  groups_present <- df_grouped |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[cd_nm]])) |>
    dplyr::distinct(.data[[cd_nm]]) |>
    dplyr::pull(.data[[cd_nm]]) |>
    as.character() |>
    sort()
  
  if (length(groups_present) == 0) {
    stop(glue::glue("No non-missing groups found in column '{cd_nm}'."))
  }
  
  fml <- stats::as.formula(
    glue::glue(
      "{outcome} ~ biotic_relaxedforestnorm + pdsi_annual + ",
      "sunab(FirstTreat, year, ref.p = {baseline}) | pt_id + year"
    )
  )
  
  tictoc::tic(
    glue::glue("model: {analysis_id} | {outcome} | {cd_nm} | {vcov_id}")
  )
  
  model_full <- feols_multi_trt(
    subgrp_col = cd_nm,
    df = df_grouped,
    groups = groups_present,
    trt_col = trt_col,
    fml = fml,
    mem.clean = TRUE,
    lean = FALSE,
    vcov = vcov
  )
  
  tictoc::toc()
  
  tictoc::tic(
    glue::glue("strip model: {analysis_id} | {outcome} | {cd_nm} | {vcov_id}")
  )
  
  model <- purrr::map(model_full, strip_fixest_model)
  names(model) <- names(model_full)
  
  rm(model_full)
  gc()
  
  tictoc::toc()
  
  tictoc::tic(
    glue::glue("plot: {analysis_id} | {outcome} | {cd_nm} | {vcov_id}")
  )
  
  plot_out <- plot_sunab_models(
    model_list = model,
    model_labels = names(model),
    title = glue::glue("DyDID analysis for {analysis_id}, {cd_nm}, {vcov_label}"),
    ribbon_type = ribbon_type,
    caption = glue::glue(
      "95% confidence intervals shown;\n",
      "Interaction-weighted (Sun-Abraham) estimates used;\n",
      "{vcov_label}"
    ),
    baseline = baseline,
    xlim = xlim,
    ylim = ylim,
    palette = palette,
    return_data = TRUE
  )
  
  tictoc::toc()
  
  p <- plot_out$plot
  plot_data <- plot_out$plot_data
  
  plot_file <- file.path(
    out_dir_model,
    glue::glue("{outcome}_{cd_nm}_{safe_analysis_id}_{safe_vcov_id}.png")
  )
  
  model_file <- file.path(
    out_dir_model,
    glue::glue("model_{outcome}_{cd_nm}_{safe_analysis_id}_{safe_vcov_id}.rds")
  )
  
  plot_obj_file <- file.path(
    out_dir_model,
    glue::glue("plot_object_{outcome}_{cd_nm}_{safe_analysis_id}_{safe_vcov_id}.rds")
  )
  
  plot_data_file <- file.path(
    out_dir_model,
    glue::glue("plot_data_{outcome}_{cd_nm}_{safe_analysis_id}_{safe_vcov_id}.rds")
  )
  
  info_file <- file.path(
    out_dir_model,
    glue::glue("run_info_{outcome}_{cd_nm}_{safe_analysis_id}_{safe_vcov_id}.rds")
  )
  
  tictoc::tic(
    glue::glue("save png: {analysis_id} | {outcome} | {cd_nm} | {vcov_id}")
  )
  
  ggplot2::ggsave(
    filename = plot_file,
    plot = p,
    width = width,
    height = height,
    dpi = dpi
  )
  
  tictoc::toc()
  
  run_info <- list(
    analysis_id = analysis_id,
    outcome = outcome,
    cd_nm = cd_nm,
    vcov_id = vcov_id,
    vcov_label = vcov_label,
    groups_present = groups_present,
    baseline = baseline,
    xlim = xlim,
    ylim = ylim,
    ribbon_type = ribbon_type,
    group_args = group_args,
    palette = palette,
    formula = fml,
    vcov = vcov,
    output_dir = out_dir_model,
    files = list(
      plot_file = plot_file,
      model_file = model_file,
      plot_obj_file = plot_obj_file,
      plot_data_file = plot_data_file,
      info_file = info_file
    )
  )
  
  tictoc::tic(
    glue::glue("save model: {analysis_id} | {outcome} | {cd_nm} | {vcov_id}")
  )
  saveRDS(model, model_file)
  tictoc::toc()
  
  tictoc::tic(
    glue::glue("save plot object: {analysis_id} | {outcome} | {cd_nm} | {vcov_id}")
  )
  saveRDS(p, plot_obj_file)
  tictoc::toc()
  
  tictoc::tic(
    glue::glue("save plot data: {analysis_id} | {outcome} | {cd_nm} | {vcov_id}")
  )
  saveRDS(plot_data, plot_data_file)
  tictoc::toc()
  
  tictoc::tic(
    glue::glue("save run info: {analysis_id} | {outcome} | {cd_nm} | {vcov_id}")
  )
  saveRDS(run_info, info_file)
  tictoc::toc()
  
  invisible(
    list(
      model = model,
      plot = p,
      plot_data = plot_data,
      run_info = run_info
    )
  )
}


run_dydid_model_from_parquet <- function(parquet_files,
                                         analysis_id,
                                         outcome,
                                         vcov,
                                         vcov_id,
                                         vcov_label = vcov_id,
                                         dir_out,
                                         group_fun = set_cd_groups,
                                         group_args,
                                         palette = NULL,
                                         baseline = -6,
                                         xlim = c(-10, 20),
                                         ylim = c(-50, 10),
                                         ribbon_type = "ribbon",
                                         width = 10,
                                         height = 7,
                                         dpi = 300,
                                         trt_col = "fire") {
  
  if (length(parquet_files) == 0) {
    stop("parquet_files is empty.")
  }
  
  if (!all(file.exists(parquet_files))) {
    missing_files <- parquet_files[!file.exists(parquet_files)]
    stop(
      glue::glue(
        "These parquet files do not exist:\n{paste(missing_files, collapse = '\n')}"
      )
    )
  }
  
  df <- arrow::open_dataset(parquet_files, format = "parquet") |>
    dplyr::collect()
  
  run_dydid_model_on_df(
    df = df,
    analysis_id = analysis_id,
    outcome = outcome,
    vcov = vcov,
    vcov_id = vcov_id,
    vcov_label = vcov_label,
    dir_out = dir_out,
    group_fun = group_fun,
    group_args = group_args,
    palette = palette,
    baseline = baseline,
    xlim = xlim,
    ylim = ylim,
    ribbon_type = ribbon_type,
    width = width,
    height = height,
    dpi = dpi,
    trt_col = trt_col
  )
}


run_dydid_experiment <- function(analysis_specs,
                                 outcome_specs,
                                 group_specs,
                                 vcov_specs,
                                 dir_out,
                                 palette = NULL,
                                 baseline = -6,
                                 xlim = c(-10, 20),
                                 ylim = c(-50, 10),
                                 ribbon_type = "ribbon",
                                 width = 10,
                                 height = 7,
                                 dpi = 300,
                                 trt_col = "fire",
                                 .progress = FALSE) {
  
  required_analysis_cols <- c("analysis_id", "parquet_files")
  required_outcome_cols <- c("outcome")
  required_group_cols <- c("group_id", "group_fun", "group_args")
  required_vcov_cols <- c("vcov_id", "vcov", "vcov_label")
  
  if (!all(required_analysis_cols %in% names(analysis_specs))) {
    stop("analysis_specs must contain: analysis_id, parquet_files")
  }
  
  if (!all(required_outcome_cols %in% names(outcome_specs))) {
    stop("outcome_specs must contain: outcome")
  }
  
  if (!all(required_group_cols %in% names(group_specs))) {
    stop("group_specs must contain: group_id, group_fun, group_args")
  }
  
  if (!all(required_vcov_cols %in% names(vcov_specs))) {
    stop("vcov_specs must contain: vcov_id, vcov, vcov_label")
  }
  
  run_grid <- tidyr::crossing(
    analysis_specs,
    outcome_specs,
    group_specs,
    vcov_specs
  ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      run_id = glue::glue("{analysis_id}_{outcome}_{group_id}_{vcov_id}")
    )
  
  results <- purrr::pmap(
    list(
      parquet_files = run_grid$parquet_files,
      analysis_id = run_grid$analysis_id,
      outcome = run_grid$outcome,
      group_fun = run_grid$group_fun,
      group_args = run_grid$group_args,
      vcov = run_grid$vcov,
      vcov_id = run_grid$vcov_id,
      vcov_label = run_grid$vcov_label
    ),
    \(parquet_files,
      analysis_id,
      outcome,
      group_fun,
      group_args,
      vcov,
      vcov_id,
      vcov_label) {
      run_dydid_model_from_parquet(
        parquet_files = parquet_files,
        analysis_id = analysis_id,
        outcome = outcome,
        vcov = vcov,
        vcov_id = vcov_id,
        vcov_label = vcov_label,
        dir_out = dir_out,
        group_fun = group_fun,
        group_args = group_args,
        palette = palette,
        baseline = baseline,
        xlim = xlim,
        ylim = ylim,
        ribbon_type = ribbon_type,
        width = width,
        height = height,
        dpi = dpi,
        trt_col = trt_col
      )
    },
    .progress = .progress
  )
  
  names(results) <- run_grid$run_id
  
  list(
    run_grid = run_grid,
    results = results
  )
}


assess_dydid_experiment <- function(analysis_specs,
                                    outcome_specs = NULL,
                                    group_specs,
                                    dir_out,
                                    n_min,
                                    ne_min,
                                    unit_id = "pt_id",
                                    event_id = "fireid",
                                    trt_col = "fire",
                                    file_name = "dydid_preanalysis_assessment.csv") {
  
  required_analysis_cols <- c("analysis_id", "parquet_files")
  required_group_cols <- c("group_id", "group_fun", "group_args")
  
  if (!all(required_analysis_cols %in% names(analysis_specs))) {
    stop("analysis_specs must contain: analysis_id, parquet_files")
  }
  
  if (!all(required_group_cols %in% names(group_specs))) {
    stop("group_specs must contain: group_id, group_fun, group_args")
  }
  
  if (!dir.exists(dir_out)) {
    dir.create(dir_out, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  }
  
  summarize_subgroups <- function(df_grouped,
                                  analysis_id,
                                  group_id,
                                  group_args,
                                  unit_id,
                                  event_id,
                                  trt_col,
                                  n_min,
                                  ne_min) {
    
    if (!unit_id %in% names(df_grouped)) {
      stop(glue::glue("Column '{unit_id}' not found in data."))
    }
    
    if (!event_id %in% names(df_grouped)) {
      stop(glue::glue("Column '{event_id}' not found in data."))
    }
    
    if (!trt_col %in% names(df_grouped)) {
      stop(glue::glue("Column '{trt_col}' not found in data."))
    }
    
    cd_nm <- group_args$cd_nm
    
    if (!cd_nm %in% names(df_grouped)) {
      stop(glue::glue("Grouping function did not create column '{cd_nm}'."))
    }
    
    subgroup_levels <- c("f", "bf", "df", "bdf")
    
    counts <- purrr::map_dfr(
      subgroup_levels,
      \(g) {
        d_sub <- df_grouped |>
          dplyr::filter(.data[[trt_col]] == 1, .data[[cd_nm]] == g)
        
        tibble::tibble(
          group = g,
          n = dplyr::n_distinct(d_sub[[unit_id]]),
          ne = dplyr::n_distinct(stats::na.omit(d_sub[[event_id]]))
        )
      }
    )
    
    out <- tibble::tibble(
      analysis_id = analysis_id,
      group_id = group_id,
      cd_nm = cd_nm,
      b_threshold = group_args$b_threshold,
      d_threshold = group_args$d_threshold,
      d_nm = group_args$d_nm
    )
    
    for (g in subgroup_levels) {
      out[[paste0(g, "_n")]] <- counts$n[counts$group == g]
      out[[paste0(g, "_ne")]] <- counts$ne[counts$group == g]
    }
    
    out |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        any_n_below_min = dplyr::if_any(
          dplyr::all_of(c("f_n", "bf_n", "df_n", "bdf_n")),
          \(x) x < n_min
        ),
        any_ne_below_min = dplyr::if_any(
          dplyr::all_of(c("f_ne", "bf_ne", "df_ne", "bdf_ne")),
          \(x) x < ne_min
        )
      )
  }
  
  assess_one_analysis_group <- function(parquet_files,
                                        analysis_id,
                                        group_id,
                                        group_fun,
                                        group_args,
                                        unit_id,
                                        event_id,
                                        trt_col,
                                        n_min,
                                        ne_min) {
    
    if (length(parquet_files) == 0) {
      stop(glue::glue("No parquet files supplied for analysis_id = '{analysis_id}'"))
    }
    
    if (!all(file.exists(parquet_files))) {
      missing_files <- parquet_files[!file.exists(parquet_files)]
      stop(
        glue::glue(
          "These parquet files do not exist for analysis_id = '{analysis_id}':\n{paste(missing_files, collapse = '\n')}"
        )
      )
    }
    
    df <- arrow::open_dataset(parquet_files, format = "parquet") |>
      dplyr::collect()
    
    df_grouped <- do.call(
      group_fun,
      c(list(df = df), group_args)
    )
    
    summarize_subgroups(
      df_grouped = df_grouped,
      analysis_id = analysis_id,
      group_id = group_id,
      group_args = group_args,
      unit_id = unit_id,
      event_id = event_id,
      trt_col = trt_col,
      n_min = n_min,
      ne_min = ne_min
    )
  }
  
  run_grid <- tidyr::crossing(
    analysis_specs |>
      dplyr::select(analysis_id, parquet_files),
    group_specs
  )
  
  assessment_tbl <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
    list(
      parquet_files = run_grid$parquet_files,
      analysis_id = run_grid$analysis_id,
      group_id = run_grid$group_id,
      group_fun = run_grid$group_fun,
      group_args = run_grid$group_args
    ),
    \(parquet_files, analysis_id, group_id, group_fun, group_args) {
      assess_one_analysis_group(
        parquet_files = parquet_files,
        analysis_id = analysis_id,
        group_id = group_id,
        group_fun = group_fun,
        group_args = group_args,
        unit_id = unit_id,
        event_id = event_id,
        trt_col = trt_col,
        n_min = n_min,
        ne_min = ne_min
      )
    }
  ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(analysis_id, group_id)
  
  output_file <- file.path(dir_out, file_name)
  readr::write_csv(assessment_tbl, output_file)
  
  assessment_tbl
}

```

# Run models v2

```{r}
analysis_specs <- make_analysis_specs_ecoregions(
  forested_ecoregions = forested_ecoregions,
  dir_data = dir_derived
)

outcome_specs <- tibble::tibble(
  outcome = c("rap_tree", "vcf_tree")
)

group_specs <- tibble::tibble(
  group_id = c(
    "b10_pdsin4t1",
    "b10_pdsin3t1",
    "b10_pdsisumn10"
  ),
  group_fun = list(
    set_cd_groups,
    set_cd_groups,
    set_cd_groups
  ),
  group_args = list(
    list(
      b_nm = "biotic_relaxedforestnorm_5_yrs_prior_sum_yot",
      d_nm = "pdsi_annual_5_yrs_prior_threshold_n4_yot",
      cd_nm = "b10_pdsin4t1",
      b_threshold = 10,
      d_threshold = 1
    ),
    list(
      b_nm = "biotic_relaxedforestnorm_5_yrs_prior_sum_yot",
      d_nm = "pdsi_annual_5_yrs_prior_threshold_n3_yot",
      cd_nm = "b10_pdsin3t1",
      b_threshold = 10,
      d_threshold = 1
    ),
    list(
      b_nm = "biotic_relaxedforestnorm_5_yrs_prior_sum_yot",
      d_nm = "pdsi_annual_5_yrs_prior_sum_yot",
      cd_nm = "b10_pdsisumn10",
      b_threshold = 10,
      d_threshold = -10
    )
  )
)

vcov_specs <- tibble::tibble(
  vcov_id = c(
    "conley_125km_20km",
    "cluster_fireid"
  ),
  vcov_label = c(
    "Conley standard errors: 125 km cutoff, 20 km pixel",
    "Clustered standard errors: fireid"
  ),
  vcov = list(
    fixest::vcov_conley(
      lat = "lat",
      lon = "long",
      cutoff = 125,
      pixel = 20,
      distance = "triangular"
    ),
    stats::as.formula("~fireid")
  )
)

group_palette <- c(
  f = "red3",
  df = "goldenrod",
  bf = "darkgreen",
  bdf = "dodgerblue3"
)

assessment_tbl <- assess_dydid_experiment(
  analysis_specs = analysis_specs,
  outcome_specs = outcome_specs,
  group_specs = group_specs,
  dir_out = dir_figs,
  n_min = 100,
  ne_min = 5
)

tictoc::tic()

dydid_experiment <- run_dydid_experiment(
  analysis_specs = analysis_specs,
  outcome_specs = outcome_specs,
  group_specs = group_specs,
  vcov_specs = vcov_specs,
  dir_out = dir_figs,
  palette = group_palette,
  baseline = -6,
  xlim = c(-10, 20),
  ylim = c(-50, 10),
  ribbon_type = "ribbon"
)

tictoc::toc()


```




<button class="accordion-button" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#collapseOne" >Click to see Session Information</button><div id="collapseOne" class="accordion-collapse collapse"><div>

```{r sessionInfo}
sessionInfo()
```
